parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { analyzed_at: $json.risk_analysis.analyzed_at, severity: $json.risk_analysis.severity, risk_score: $json.risk_analysis.risk_score, flags: $json.risk_analysis.flags, llm_analysis: $json.llm_analysis, recommended_action: ($json.risk_analysis.triggered_action && $json.risk_analysis.triggered_action.command) || '', explanation: $json.risk_analysis.explanation, requires_human_review: $json.risk_analysis.requires_human_review, source: 'n8n', updated_at: $json.risk_analysis.analyzed_at } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ thing_id: $json.thing_id, severity: $json.risk_analysis.severity, event: $json, risk_analysis: $json.risk_analysis, llm_analysis: $json.llm_analysis }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const event = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...event, llm_analysis: { skipped: true, reason: 'LOW_RISK' } } }];
